title: Setaria proliseta
taxonomy: Setaria proliseta is classified as a species of grass within the family Poaceae. It belongs to the genus Setaria and is a type of millet or foxtail grass. The species is further classified into the order Poales and the class Liliopsida. Within the kingdom Plantae, Setaria proliseta is a monocot, characterized by its single cotyledon and parallel-veined leaves. This classification reflects the plant's evolutionary relationships and shared characteristics with other grasses in the Poaceae family.
